description: Contributing to live quantitative development projects with real market data and trading constraints. Working on production systems, execution assumptions, and market workflows using Python.
bullets: Ship production-ready quant features on live market data under trading constraints.
Handle execution assumptions, order flows, and risk constraints.
Support factor research and performance diagnostics for live strategies.

description: Core AI engineer on deterministic multi-agent backtesting and an LLM-orchestrated quant research layer.
bullets: Built a deterministic multi-agent framework turning English strategy intent into executable backtests with rule-based validation and cryptographic hashes.
Created an LLM-orchestrated quant research layer with human-in-the-loop controls, safety checks, and a research visualization interface.

description: Applied ML and optimization for solar rooftop investment analysis and decision support.
bullets: Built cash-flow and payback models in Python (NumPy, Pandas) for solar rooftop investments and encoded subsidy/tariff policies as numerical constraints.
Ran sensitivity and risk analysis across electricity prices and system sizes, proposing a solar panel loss estimation method for rooftop decision-support.
Built a RAG-based QA system over tabular policy data using Camelot.
